changes.text: Implemented FALLBACK_LOGS for file:// protocol support (CORS bypass).
Resolved modal click interference and improved link target areas.
Linked changelog commit hashes directly to GitHub.
Finalized system versioning and documentation alignment.
Implemented Markdown Export for documentation sharing.
Added PWA support with Service Worker for offline persistence.
Enhanced Drag and Drop: Real-time fluid previews and improved nesting logic.
Externalized changelog management to a dynamic JSON system.
Included course titles in Tree copy output (CODE - Title format).
Standardized async naming and refactored UI into focused components.
Added PSET numbering (PSET#01) to all export functions.
Initial repository setup and system foundation.
